top_signals.title: Satoshi’s 1.1 million bitcoin and millions more can be saved from quantum attack, says expert
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: UK plans for cybercrime law reform would protect almost no one, experts warn
top_signals.summary: The proposals would require researchers to cease activity the moment a vulnerability is identified, meaning they could not confirm it was real, assess its severity or determine its exploitability.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Morrisons blames Labour for closure of 100 lossmaking stores
top_signals.summary: Morrisons has taken aim at Labour policy for “significant cost increases” as it announced the closure of 100 lossmaking stores.  The supermarket chain said on Thursday that it will close the 100 unprofitable Morrisons Daily convenience stores, in a move which could affect hundreds of jobs. Morrisons has faced steep debt costs following its £7bn [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
